summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Info Pages CMS feature. All 7 info pages (delivery, returns, faq, contact, track, privacy, terms) are working correctly. Backend API tests: 13/13 passed. Frontend customer-facing pages render correctly with cards, tables, text, and FAQ accordion sections. Admin InfoPagesEditor is accessible via Homepage Manager > Footer section and allows editing all 7 pages.
seed_data_creation: All 7 info pages already seeded in database by previous agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Info Pages CMS feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/website-admin/info-pages (returns all 7 pages), GET/POST /api/website-admin/info-pages/{slug}. Customer-facing pages at /shop/info/{slug}. Admin editor at Homepage Manager > Footer section. All data-testid attributes verified: info-pages-editor, page-tab-{slug}, save-page-btn, page-editor-{slug}, section-{id}.

backend_api: ✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/delivery returns correct page with cards, text, table sections
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/faq returns correct page with FAQ accordion items
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/privacy returns correct page with title 'Privacy Policy'
✓ GET /api/website-admin/info-pages/terms returns correct page with title 'Terms & Conditions'
customer_facing_pages: ✓ /shop/info/delivery renders with cards (4), text sections, and pricing table
✓ /shop/info/faq renders with FAQ accordion (2 items, expandable)
footer_links: ✓ Delivery Information link (/shop/info/delivery) present in footer
✓ Returns & Refunds link (/shop/info/returns) present in footer
✓ Privacy Policy link (/shop/info/privacy) present in footer
✓ Terms & Conditions link (/shop/info/terms) present in footer
admin_editor: ✓ InfoPagesEditor accessible at Homepage Manager > Footer section
✓ All 7 page tabs visible (Delivery, Returns, FAQ, Contact, Track, Privacy, Terms)
✓ Page editor shows sections with type badges (INFO CARDS, RICH TEXT, PRICING TABLE)
✓ Save Page button present and functional
✓ Visible/Hidden toggle present for each page
